a:r.a:t: Click to edit Master title style
Accent Colors for Infographics and charts only
Neutrals for Infographics and charts only
The colors are applied at both ends of the gradient. at 0% and 100% locations
The gradients are used at a 0º angle
Use the linear gradient. never radial
Do not create new gradients; use only the gradients shown here
Prioritize our blues. but they don’t have to be used all at once
Mix light. mid and dark tones within data sets
